faq.question: <p>Are the covers and blankets bulky or heavy?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The&nbsp;insulated covers and blankets are durable and lightweight, as well as&nbsp;easy to manage.</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the best way to prepare the covers and blankets for transit?</p>
faq.answer: <p>It is recommended that you keep the covers and blankets in a cold temperature sitting prior to covering the product. This will help ensure product temperature doesn’t elevate to a higher (warmer) temperature.</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the difference between a pallet cover and the blanket?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The pallet cover has a four sided construction that allows easy access from all sides with a Velcro closure that is adjustable. The blanket is used to drape over the product.</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the interior material made of?</p>
<p>What is the outer material made of?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The outer material is a coated nylon material that is water repellent.</p>

faq.question: <p>What is the main purpose of the pallet covers and blankets?</p>
faq.answer: <p>The covers and blankets are designed to protect temperature sensitive food items during transit</p>
